info.title: VTEX Pricing Service
info.description:
Manage communication between Janis Pricing and VTEX Prices

 **Last update**: 18 feb 26, 07:42 a. m.

get.summary: Get a price publish queue item
Get a list of price sheets

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of price sheets in the list

get.summary: Get VTEX prices for the Sku of a Price or BasePrice

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

dateCreatedFrom.description: Matches with items that were created from the received date

dateCreatedTo.description: Matches with items that were created up to the received date

dateModifiedFrom.description: Matches with items that were modified from the received date

dateModifiedTo.description: Matches with items that were modified up to the received date

listPriceValue.description: The list price value. This price must be greater than the `price` field.

skuCatalogId.description: The ID of the SKU. Refers to the `id` of the catalog **SKU** entity. See [SKU](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Sku).

skuVtexId.description:
The VTEX SKU `id`.
This field refer to [SKU](v2/service/vtex-catalog#tag/Sku) entity of **Janis VTEX Catalog Service**. See [Janis VTEX Catalog Service](/v2/service/vtex-catalog).

accountId.description:
The Account `id`.
This field refer to **Janis VTEX Commerce Service**. See [Account](/v2/service/vtex-commerce#tag/Account).

stateMachineArn.description: The current/last publish State Machine Execution ARN (visible only for DEV users)

stateMachineUrl.description: The current/last publish State Machine Execution URL in AWS (visible only for DEV users)

stateMachineArn.description: The current/last import State Machine Execution ARN (visible only for DEV users)

stateMachineUrl.description: The current/last import State Machine Execution URL in AWS (visible only for DEV users)

BasePricePublish.description: A base price to publish object

BasePricePublishList.description: A list of base prices to publish

FunctionTotals.description: The totals data. It is only available when `calculateTotals` parameter is active

total.description: The total items found in database applied filters

pages.description: The total pages for the filters applied

priceSheet.description: The ID of the price sheet. Refers to the `id` of the pricing **price-sheet** entity. See [price-sheet](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price-Sheet)

pricingId.description:
The Pricing `id`.
This field refer to **Janis Pricing Service**. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/Price).

minQuantity.description:
The minimal quantity of an SKU to apply the specified price.
This field is used to generate the concept known as "price by quantity".

dateFrom.description:
The date from where the price will apply.

**Important**: This value must be a ISOString. See more information in [ISO_8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

This field should be lesser than `dateTo`

dateTo.description:
The date until the price will apply.

**Important**: This value must be a ISOString. See more information in [ISO_8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601).

This field must be greater than `dateFrom`

PricePublishList.description: A list of prices to publish

skusIds.description: The Sku ids of the prices or base prices that will be published.

status.description:
The status of the PublishQueue item.
- `pending` is when the queue item is created and is waiting to be processed, also after fails and waiting to be retried.
- `processing` is when the queue item is been processed.
- `readyForPublish` is when the queue item is processed and all items are ready to be published/unpublished.
- `success` is when all the prices and/or base prices were published/unpublished.
- `error` is when an error ocurred while publishing.
- `validationError` is when the Account has a problem and cannot be publish. eg. Account is inactive.

PricePublishQueueList.description: A list of Price Publish Queue items

pricingId.description:
The Pricing `id`.
This field refer to **Janis Pricing Service**. See [Price](/v2/service/pricing#tag/PriceSheet).

vtexId.description: The VTEX ID of the Price Table

salesChannels.description: A list of sales channels IDs. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

items.description: The Sales Channel ID. This refer to the `id` of the **Sales Channel** Entity of **Janis Commerce Service**. See [Sales Channel](/v2/service/commerce#tag/Sales-Channel).

priceTable.description: Indicates if the Price Sheet is a Price Table on VTEX

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

BasePriceFilters.name: filters
BasePriceFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

FunctionsFilters.name: filters
FunctionsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the model

schema.description: The filters to apply to the model

FunctionsCalculateTotals.description: Indicates if the response must return the totals data applied filters. **Default** `false`

FunctionsAllItems.name: allItems
FunctionsAllItems.description: Indicates if the response must return all items. **Default** `false`

PriceFilters.name: filters
PriceFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PricePublishQueueFilters.name: filters
PricePublishQueueFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

PriceSheetFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list
